description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy job named production that runs in the default (deploy) stage. The job executes the exact shell command: set -e; curl -fs -XPOST -d "{\"after\":\"$CI_BUILD_REF\",\"ref\":\"refs/heads/$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\",\"gitlab\":true}" http://live.leanpoker.org:80/api/tournament/58346a9c0d678f0004000003/team/poker-player-silly-gray-wolf/deploy?secret=$SECRET. No Docker image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined. The job is of type deploy and runs on every pipeline execution.
